issue_summary: Make HashCode implementations serializable. Created by MOE: http://code.google.com/p/moe-java MOE_MIGRATED_REVID=29100445
javadoc_before:
/**

javadoc_after:
/**
 * Static factories for creating {@link HashCode} instances; most users should never have to use
 * this. All returned instances are {@link Serializable}.
 *
 * @author Dimitris Andreou
 * @since 12.0
 */
